channel.title: dout.dev - May 2026
channel.description: RSS feed for posts from May 2026

item.title: Modern CSS Is Enough (Container Queries, Nesting, `:has()` - No Framework Required)
Vibe Coding With Rigor (Or: How to Use AI Without Your Codebase Turning Into a Dumpster Fire)
item.description: The term I am reclaiming (because "vibe coding" got a bad rap)

item.title: CI/CD Around GitHub Pages (Or: How I Got Deploy Previews Without Paying Netlify)
item.description: The gap GitHub Pages leaves open (it's not that bad)

item.title: Quality Gate: Linting, Formatting, and Verify (Or: How I Stopped Shipping Broken HTML)
item.description: Why the gate exists (because you will ship shit if you don't)

item.title: SEO Metadata Without Rituals (Or: I Read 47 SEO Blog Posts So You Don't Have To)
item.description: The short version (TL;DR for the impatient)

item.title: OG Images at Build Time (Or: How I Stopped Worrying and Learned to Love Sharp)
item.description: The problem and the usual solutions (none of which I wanted)

item.title: Feeds and Sitemaps at Build Time (RSS Is Dead, Long Live RSS. Also JSON Feed.)
item.description: The distribution minimum (three files, that's it)

item.title: Build Assets Pipeline (Or: How I Turned a Simple Blog Into an Image Processing Factory)
Design Tokens Before Pages (Yes, I Wrote the CSS Before the First Line of HTML)
item.description: The mistake I kept making (repeat after me: tokens first)
